content.full_text:
FPPC

MAR 15 8:56 AM '90

March 11, 1990


Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804

Dear Sir/Madam:

I am the campaign treasurer for the Committee to Elect
Darlene Lee, Id. #841496. The purpose of this letter is to
request a written opinion concerning the expenditure of campaign
funds to non-profit organizations.

As background information, the Committee was formed, on
behalf of Darlene Lee, in August 1984. She was initially elected
to the Eden Hospital Board of Directors in November 1984 and was
subsequently re-elected in November 1988. Currently, Mrs. Lee is
a member of the Board. All monies raised for Mrs. Lee were
raised between August and November 1984. Since November 1984 no
money has been raised on behalf of the Committee or the
Candidate.

Please advise, in writing, as soon as possible, as to
whether the Committee can expend campaign funds to non-profit
organizations. The money will not be used by these non-profit
organizations to support or to oppose any candidates or ballot
measures.

Your prompt attention to this matter is greatly appreciated.
I thank you in advance for your cooperation. Should more
information be needed, I can be reached at the address listed
below. I remain,

Sincerely,

David A. Lee
DAVID A. LEE, ESQ.
Campaign Treasurer
Committee to Elect Darlene Lee
4793 Ewing Road
Castro Valley, CA 94546

cc: Darlene Lee


[The document quality is too degraded to provide an accurate transcription while following the rule to copy text verbatim and mark illegible sections appropriately.]
